indemnity.title: Indemnity
indemnity.standardText: Each party shall indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the other party from and against any and all third-party claims, losses, damages, liabilities, costs, and expenses (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising out of or relating to a breach of this Agreement, gross negligence, or willful misconduct by the indemnifying party.
indemnity.idealRisk: Mutual and limited to third-party claims resulting from breach, gross negligence, or willful misconduct.

limitation_of_liability.title: Limitation of Liability
limitation_of_liability.standardText: Except for breaches of confidentiality, indemnification obligations, or willful misconduct, neither party shall be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or loss of profits or revenues. Each party's maximum aggregate liability under this Agreement shall be limited to the total fees paid or payable under this Agreement in the twelve (12) months preceding the event giving rise to liability.
limitation_of_liability.idealRisk: Mutual limitation capped at 12 months fees, with standard exclusions for confidentiality and indemnity.

governing_law.title: Governing Law
governing_law.standardText: This Agreement shall be governed by, and construed in accordance with, the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to its conflict of laws principles. The parties submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the state and federal courts located in Wilmington, Delaware.
governing_law.idealRisk: Neutral and widely accepted venue (like Delaware, New York, or California) with mutual consent to jurisdiction.

termination.title: Termination
termination.standardText: Either party may terminate this Agreement for convenience upon ninety (90) days' written notice. Either party may terminate this Agreement for cause if the other party materially breaches this Agreement and fails to cure such breach within thirty (30) days of receiving written notice thereof.
termination.idealRisk: Mutual convenience termination (60-90 days) and mutual cause termination with 30-day cure period.

ip_ownership.title: IP Ownership
ip_ownership.standardText: Each party retains all right, title, and interest in its pre-existing intellectual property. Any intellectual property created or developed solely or jointly by a party in connection with the services shall be owned by the party that created it, and to the extent it constitutes deliverables, shall be licensed to the client on a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free, perpetual basis.
ip_ownership.idealRisk: Clear ownership of pre-existing intellectual property, with work-for-hire rights or perpetual licensing transfer for paid deliverables.

payment_terms.title: Payment Terms
payment_terms.standardText: Client shall pay all undisputed invoices within thirty (30) days of receipt. Any late payments not subject to a good faith dispute shall accrue interest at a rate of 1.0% per month, or the maximum rate permitted by law, whichever is lower.
payment_terms.idealRisk: Net-30 payment terms, with a mechanism for disputing invoices in good faith before late fees apply.

confidentiality.title: Confidentiality
confidentiality.standardText: Each party agrees to hold the other party's Confidential Information in strict confidence and to use at least the same degree of care it uses to protect its own confidential information, but in no event less than a reasonable degree of care. Confidential Information shall not be disclosed to third parties except to employees, consultants, or advisors with a need to know and who are bound by confidentiality obligations at least as restrictive as those herein. This obligation survives termination for a period of three (3) years.
confidentiality.idealRisk: Mutual confidentiality obligation with standard exceptions, surviving termination for a reasonable period (3-5 years).
